positive: A minimalist, abstract representation of a celestial constellation map blended with natural, flowing river geometry. The main subject is a perfect, circular grouping of luminous, interconnected dots (the stars) forming recognizable yet stylized zodiac patterns. These glowing nodes connect to sinuous, deep cyan and indigo line work that mimics flowing water paths. The overall aesthetic should be high contrast, favoring deep midnight blues, metallic silver accents, and pops of electric, glowing teal. The composition must be perfectly centered and balanced, suitable for direct printing on apparel. Style: Highly detailed line art, geometric abstraction, cosmic maximalism, vector illustration quality. Lighting: Cinematic glow emanating only from the constellation lines, deep shadows surrounding the form. Aspect ratio 1:1. Clean silhouette required.
negative: blurry, text, writing, watermark, logo, signature, artifact, smudge, noise, bad anatomy, ugly, messy, low contrast, faded, distressed
